pages.text:
RAYCHEM HEAT-SHRINKABLE TERMINATION
SYSTEMS - EPKT
FOR MI/MIND PAPER AND PLASTIC INSULATED CABLES UP TO 1 KV
KEY FEATURES With millions of installations throughout the world, Raychem cable
terminations from TE Connectivity for up to 1 kV are acknowledged to be
• High insulating and sealing
more reliable and quicker to install than conventional systems.
ability even in extreme
temperatures, atmospheric A proven system: consistent performance in extreme temperatures,
pollution and ultra-violet atmospheric pollution and ultra-violet light has proven the insulating and
light sealing ability of TE’s Raychem cable terminations for more than 35 years.
• Meets CENELEC 50393 Ease of installation: installed by way of heat-shrinking, the heat shrink
system saves time, eliminates special equipment and simplifi es work
• Easy to install
overhead and work in confi ned spaces. Varying cable constructions can
be easily accommodated, and every kit typically covers three to four cable
• Kits cover a wide range
sizes. Thus inventories are reduced and stockkeeping minimized.
of cable sizes and varying
cable constructions
Performance: TE’s Raychem cable terminations meet our specifi cation PPS
3013, which includes the requirements of the major national standards and
international norms and also meets CENELEC 50393. High performance
and effi ciency are the results of TE Connectivity’s expertise in materials
science and electrical power engineering, gained through a sustained
research eff ort and extensive experience as one of the largest cable
accessory makers.
Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s
proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support.
ENERGY /// RAYCHEM HEAT-SHRINKABLE TERMINATION SYSTEMS - EPKT

High performance and effi ciency are the results of TE Connectivity’s expertise in materials science and electrical power engineering, gained through a sustained research eff ort and extensive experience as one of the largest cable accessory makers. pages.text:
Raychem Heat-Shrinkable Termination Systems - EPKT
TE connectivity delivers a wide range of terminating and
jointing systems and support customers with full service,
installer training and technical assistance to meet the demands
of the growing world of energy.
Test Sequence Result
A.C. Voltage Withstand in Air 4kV for 1 minute no breakdown and no fl ashover
between each phase core in turn and all
Insulation Resistance in Air >1000M
other phase cores
A.C. Voltage Withstand in Water 4kV for 1 minute no breakdown and no fl ashover
between bunched phase cores and grounded
Insulation Resistance in Water water & between each phase core in turn >1000M
and all other phase cores
63 cycles
5h heating, 3h cooling
conductor temperature:
Load Cycling in Air pass
Paper cables: 85°C
PVC cables: 75°C
XLPE cables: 95°C
Load Cycling in Water as above, with cable in 1m water pass
A.C. Voltage Withstand in Water 4kV for 1 minute no breakdown and no fl ashover
Insulation Resistance in Water as above, with cable in 1m water >1000M
1. All voltages are phase to ground
Notes:
2. Further details are available on request
ORDERING INFORMATION
TE Connectivity’s Raychem termination kits are available for MI/MIND paper and plastic insulated cables for up to
1 kV, with 2 to 4 core and with conductor cross-sections up to 400 mm2. Solderless earth connections and a full
selection table are available on request.
TE’s Raychem termination kits are supplied complete with full installation and application information.
For further details on this or any other products of TE’s product family Raychem, please contact your local sales
representative.
FOR MORE INFORMATION:

images.context_text: Raychem Heat-Shrinkable Termination Systems - EPKT TE connectivity delivers a wide range of terminating and jointing systems and support customers with full service, installer training and technical assistance to meet the demands of the growing world of energy. Test Sequence Result A.C. Voltage Withstand in Air 4kV for 1 minute no breakdown and no fl ashover between each phase core in turn and all Insulation Resistance in Air >1000M other phase cores A.C. Voltage Withstand in Water 4kV for 1 minute no breakdown and no fl ashover between bunched phase cores and grounded Insulation Resistance in Water water & between each phase core in turn >1000M and all other phase cores 63 cycles 5h heating, 3h cooling conductor temperature: Load Cycling in Air pass Paper cables: 85°C PVC cables: 75°C XLPE cables: 95°C Load Cycling in Water as above, with cable in 1m water pass A.C. Voltage Withstand in Water 4kV for 1 minute no breakdown and no fl ashover Insulation Resistance in Water as above, with cable in 1m water >1000M 1. All voltages are phase to ground Notes: 2. Further details are available on request ORDERING INFORMATION TE Connectivity’s Raychem termination kits are available for MI/MIND paper and plastic insulated cables for up to 1 kV, with 2 to 4 core and with conductor cross-sections up to 400 mm2. Solderless earth connections and a full selection table are available on request. TE’s Raychem termination kits are supplied complete with full installation and application information. For further details on this or any other products of TE’s product family Raychem, please contact your local sales representative. FOR MORE INFORMATION: TE Technical Support Centers USA: + 1 800 327 6996 France: + 33 380 583 200 te.com/energy UK: + 44 0870 870 7500 Germany: + 49 896 089 903 ©2016 TE Connectivity Ltd. family of companies.
